opportunities.title: OutBound Sales Training & Leadership Conference 2026

opportunities.fit_reason: Billed as the world's premier sales training and leadership conference featuring world-class sales trainers, authors, and leadership experts, making it a natural stage for a trust-based sales coach.

opportunities.title: Sales 3.0 Conference - AI Sales Summit / Sales Training and Enablement Summit (2026 series)

opportunities.title: Influence 2026 (NSA Annual Conference)
